businessContext_i18n.de: Von Flecken betroffene Fläche in Quadratmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface affectée par la tache en mètres carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área afectada por la mancha en metros cuadrados.

inputs.label: Leke Yoğunluğu
inputs.businessContext: Stain intensity percentage (0-100). A higher value indicates a more concentrated stain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stain intensity percentage (0-100). A higher value indicates a more concentrated stain.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Leke yoğunluğu yüzdesi (0-100). Daha yüksek değer daha konsantre lekeyi gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fleckenintensität in Prozent (0-100). Ein höherer Wert bedeutet einen konzentrierteren Fleck.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'intensité de la tache (0-100). Une valeur plus élevée indique une tache plus concentrée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de intensidad de la mancha (0-100). Un valor más alto indica una mancha más concentrada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة كثافة البقعة (0-100). القيمة الأعلى تشير إلى بقعة أكثر تركيزًا

inputs.label: Kaplama Oranı
inputs.businessContext: Surface area that 1 liter of cleaning solution can cover under ideal conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Surface area that 1 liter of cleaning solution can cover under ideal conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 litre temizlik solüsyonunun ideal koşullarda kaplayabileceği yüzey alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Oberfläche, die 1 Liter Reinigungslösung unter idealen Bedingungen bedecken kann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface qu'un litre de solution de nettoyage peut couvrir dans des conditions idéales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área de superficie que 1 litro de solución limpiadora puede cubrir en condiciones ideales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مساحة السطح التي يغطيها لتر واحد من محلول التنظيف في الظروف المثالية

inputs.label: Temizlik Verimliliği
inputs.businessContext: Real-world cleaning efficiency, accounting for losses like overspray or absorption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Real-world cleaning efficiency, accounting for losses like overspray or absorption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Püskürtme kaybı veya emilim gibi kayıpları hesaba katan gerçek dünya temizlik verimliliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reale Reinigungseffizienz unter Berücksichtigung von Verlusten wie Sprühnebel oder Absorption.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité de nettoyage réelle, tenant compte des pertes comme les surprojections ou l'absorption.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia de limpieza en condiciones reales, considerando pérdidas como salpicaduras o absorción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة التنظيف الفعلية، مع مراعاة الفقد مثل الرش الزائد أو الامتصاص

inputs.label: Uygulama Katmanı
inputs.businessContext: Number of application coats required to remove the stain completely.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of application coats required to remove the stain completely.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lekeyi tamamen çıkarmak için gereken uygulama katmanı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lekeyi tamamen çıkarmak için gereken uygulama katmanı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de couches d'application nécessaires pour éliminer complètement la tache.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de capas de aplicación necesarias para eliminar completamente la mancha.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد طبقات التطبيق المطلوبة لإزالة البقعة بالكامل.
